name: Brand and Agency Case Studies

licenseNotes: Use case studies to extract general principles and critique language. Do not clone visual identities, artwork, copy, proprietary layouts, logos, or brand assets.
extractedSignals: Elite brand work has a point of view before it has components.
Top product sites prove the product through real surfaces, code, docs, or workflows.
Agency-level outcomes rely on strong constraints, not more decoration.
